title: Slivkaa's Simple Rules
description: This plugin adds /rules command with forced acceptance
body:
This plugin adds /rules command with forced acceptance
You can change: rules, button text, warning text, accept and kick text in config.yml

Chat messages when joining the server and accepting the rules with default config:
![Chat messages when joining the server and accepting the rules with default config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7dd1eb92c850bcdc8dc06aaeb4b93bfd81c9e1.png)

permissions:
